goal:
First, create a note in Markor named 'recipes.txt' with the following content:
# Egg Fried Rice
Fry rice with eggs, soy sauce, and green onions.
# Avocado Toast
Toast bread, spread mashed avocado, add salt and pepper.
Then, add the recipes from recipes.txt in Markor to the Broccoli recipe app.

recipes.title: Egg Fried Rice
recipes.description: Fry rice with eggs, soy sauce, and green onions.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
recipes.description: Toast bread, spread mashed avocado, add salt and pepper.
